response.overview: Independence Day 2008. Bathan, a 13-year-old girl, stands on the side of the road and begs for help. In the silent car next to her, her father lies unconscious, surrounded by three small children. Many vehicles pass by indifferently, until one Druze man stops, performs CPR, and disappears without a trace. The father did not survive, and since then the family has been locked in a suffocating silence for 17 years. The heroine decides to break the silence and sets out on a journey to find the man, certain that he is the key to healing
response.title: Shoulder
